parameters-en.Speed: Selects Slow or Fast rotary speed.
parameters-en.Depth: Controls the depth or intensity of the drum speaker.
parameters-en.Horn Depth: Controls the depth or intensity of the horn speaker.
parameters-en.Drive: Controls how much of the speaker's internal amp is overdriven. At higher values, the speaker imparts more of a gritty sound.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the rotary effect and the dry signal. At 0%, no rotary effect is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
